author: Jonah Largen
name: Cairn Hypermedia API
description: An ASP.NET Core minimal API wired for Cairn hypermedia (HATEOAS): clean DTOs, separate link configurations, a state-conditional affordance, compile-checked routes, and an optional browsable HAL explorer.

Framework.description: The target framework for the project.

explorer.description: Include the browsable HAL Explorer (Cairn.AspNetCore.Explorer), mounted at /explorer in Development.

openapi.description: Document the hypermedia in Swagger via Cairn.Swashbuckle and serve the Swagger UI in Development.

postActions.description: Restore NuGet packages required by this project.
